text.title: Rust Backend (Axum) Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply rust-backend end-to-end.

step.name: define-app-error
step.action: Implement AppError enum with IntoResponse to RFC 7807.

step.name: write-vertical-slice
step.action: Implement model → db → service → handler → route + tests in one PR.

step.name: wire-state-and-shutdown
step.action: Arc-wrap AppState; signal-handler triggers graceful shutdown.
